sources.name: DfE
sources.dataset: Suspensions and permanent exclusions in England

metadata.methodology: DfE annual statistics on permanent exclusions and fixed-period suspensions from state-funded primary, secondary and special schools in England. SEND and FSM figures from same source. COVID years (2019/20, 2020/21) show lower figures due to school closures.
knownIssues: COVID-19 school closures caused lower exclusion rates in 2019/20 and 2020/21.
Some schools use informal 'off-rolling' (removing pupils from school rolls without formal exclusion) to avoid inclusion in official statistics.
DfE changed terminology in 2023 from 'fixed-term exclusion' to 'suspension'.
